title: orchis cordigera f. rivularis
intro: Orchis cordigera f. rivularis is a variety of the Orchis cordigera species, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of Orchis cordigera f. rivularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve circulation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
